data.name: SelectVenueToEdit
data.value: Which venue would you like to edit? 🤔

data.name: Dismissed
data.value: Okay! Let me know if you need anything. 💕

data.name: AskForDescriptionMessage
data.value: Could you give me an ad or **description** of the venue? Something for players to read when they click on your venue.

data.name: AskIfHasMareMessage
data.value: Does your venue have a public **Mare SyncShell**?

data.name: AskIfHasSchedule
data.value: Oki! Do you have a weekly opening schedule?

data.name: DescriptionHasWeeklySchedule
data.value: Yes, our openings are every week.

data.name: DescriptionHasBiweeklySchedule
data.value: Yes, our openings are every 2 weeks

data.name: DescriptionHasNoSchedule
data.value: No, we don't have a set schedule

data.name: NoPermission
data.value: Aaaah. You'll need to [create a ticket](https://discord.com/channels/942536163959406632/1188579990271434883) and ask staff in the FFXIV Venues discord to change this part of your venue information. 😊

data.name: OpeningTooLong
data.value: Aaaah, that's a long opening, max is **7 hours**. 😢

data.name: DescriptionHasMonthlySchedule
data.value: Yes, our openings are on a particular day of every month.

data.name: AskWhenInMonthMessage
data.value: Which **{0}**s of the month are you open?

data.name: AskForHowLongClosingFor
data.value: And how long are we closing for? 🥹

data.name: AskForHowLongOpeningFor
data.value: Yay, how long are we opening for? 🥰

data.name: AskForDayOfClosing
data.value: Oki, what **day** is this closing from?

data.name: VenueNowClosed
data.value: Okay! I'll lock up! I can't wait til we reopen. 🥰

data.name: VenueOpenLater
data.value: Wooo! We're all set. I can't wait! ♥️

data.name: VenueNowOpen
data.value: Yay! You're glowing pink on the index. Let's have fun today! ♥️

data.name: VenueOpeningEnded
data.value: Okay! All closed up, I hope you had fun! ♥️

data.name: AskForOpeningToCancel
data.value: Okay! Which opening do you want to cancel? 🥰

data.name: VenueClosureEnded
data.value: Yay! I've removed your closure status. Welcome back! ♥️

data.name: AskForClosureToCancel
data.value: Okay! Which closure do you wish to cancel? 🥰

data.name: AskForScenesMessage
data.value: Oki! Select the **scenes** that best describe your venue (maximum 2). 🙂

data.name: AskForFeaturesMessage
data.value: Now, select all the **features** that apply to your venue. 😊

data.name: AskForGamesMessage
data.value: Select all the **games** your venue features. 👾

data.name: TagDescription_TripleTriad
data.value: The venue offers individual or competitive games of Triple Triad via the game interface itself.

data.name: TagDescription_TruthOrDare
data.value: The venue offers a game of Truth or Dare for whomever feels like joining.

data.name: TagDescription_Blackjack
data.value: The venue holds a table for players who wish to gamble gil in a game of 21.

data.name: TagDescription_Deathroll
data.value: The venue offers individual or competitive game of Deathroll usually with prizes involved.

data.name: TagDescription_TexasHoldem
data.value: The venue holds a table for players who wish to gamble gil in a game of Texas holdem.

data.name: TagDescription_Bingo
data.value: The venue holds a venue wide bingo game, usually with prizes involved.

data.name: TagDescription_Roulette
data.value: The venue holds a table for players who wish to gamble gil in a game of Roulette.

data.name: TagDescription_Courtesans
data.value: The venue offers erotic role-play services in a consensual environment.

data.name: TagDescription_Gambling
data.value: The venue offers various games of chance with set amounts of gils and house rules.

data.name: TagDescription_Artists
data.value: Artists are present in the venue to offer various custom artwork.

data.name: TagDescription_Dancers
data.value: Dancers populate the venue to hype the party and/or host customers.

data.name: TagDescription_Bards
data.value: A bard provides theme-based or general music to entertain guests with a selection of songs.

data.name: TagDescription_Food
data.value: The venue offers food in their service.

data.name: TagDescription_Drink
data.value: The venue offers drinks in their service, this may be soft drinks or include alcohol.

data.name: TagDescription_TwitchDJ
data.value: The venue hosts a DJ who provides music in twitch streams and hype the venue.

data.name: TagDescription_SyncDJ
data.value: The venue hosts a sync DJ who offers music via a syncshell.

data.name: TagDescription_Bar
data.value: The venue offers a bar in the environment.

data.name: TagDescription_Tarot
data.value: A Tarot Reader offers to read drawn cards and provide insights about their possible meaning.

data.name: TagDescription_PillowTalk
data.value: Pillows provide a safe, confidential space to promote SFW companionship for a limited time.

data.name: TagDescription_Photography
data.value: Photographers take snapshots or complex gpose of guests to create memories.

data.name: TagDescription_OpenStage
data.value: The venue offers the stage for a patron to perform to the audience.

data.name: TagDescription_Void
data.value: The venue is build in the void; created outside the walls of the house.

data.name: TagDescription_Stylists
data.value: Stylists offer various glamour services, including hair styling, makeup, and wardrobe assistance.

data.name: TagDescription_NovelPerformances
data.value: Unique scheduled performances, ranging from SFW (theater) to NSFW (voyeur shows, BDSM).

data.name: TagDescription_Giveaways
data.value: The venue offers giveaways through various channels, in chat, twitch stream or discord.

data.name: TagDescription_SyncshellAvailable
data.value: This venue has a syncshell available for guests to join and see each other as they see themselves.

data.name: TagDescription_VIPAvailable
data.value: Various perks through VIP tiers. This could include free drinks, gpose, gambling perks or more.

data.name: TagDescription_LgbtqiaFocused
data.value: The venue is a safe space focused on LGBTQIA+.

data.name: TagDescription_IcRpEncouraged
data.value: Encourages role play as characters, though interacting as themselves is allowed.

data.name: TagDescription_IcRpOnly
data.value: Environment for players to role play as their characters only; no open interaction as themselves.

data.name: TagDescription_OpenHouse247
data.value: This venue allows anyone to visit at anytime, even outside of any scheduled hours.

data.name: SfwDescription_True
data.value: The venue is SFW in the open area.

data.name: SfwDescription_False
data.value: The venue contains adult content in the open area.

data.name: UnstaffedOpeningsNotSupported
data.value:
### Unstaffed openings are not supported
We do not support 'always open houses' or unstaffed openings, please only list explicitly scheduled staffed openings; if you do so anyway the team may remove your schedule/venue following enough flags from the community. If you do have a regular staffed opening longer than 7 hours please [create a ticket](https://discord.com/channels/942536163959406632/1188579990271434883), staff can override this for you.
